source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Compact English UI with Japanese typography guidance for planter dashboards, home task labels, table text, search commands, and calm status copy.
layout: Dense home-scale dashboards, compact navigation, 8px radii, petal-red actions, round-leaf success states, soil-speckle separators, and warm window-box surfaces.

prompts.label: Transparent Geranium motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Geranium transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create a single compact geranium bloom cluster with round scalloped green leaves, isolated for a transparent cutout.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal.
Subject: scarlet red geranium flower heads with rounded five-petal florets, a few buds, short stems, round medium-green leaves with subtle veining and scalloped edges, small hint of window-box soil/wood neutral at the stem base only.
Style/medium: high-detail botanical cutout, natural light, realistic painted-photographic finish, crisp opaque edges.
Composition/framing: centered full subject, generous padding on all sides, no cropping, no floor plane.
Lighting/mood: clean compact home-system mood, bright but soft, no cast shadow and no contact shadow.
Color palette: scarlet petals, round green leaves, warm soil brown and window-box wood neutrals only; do not use magenta in the subject.
Constraints: background must be one uniform #ff00ff color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, or lighting variation. Keep subject fully separated from background with crisp edges.
Avoid: vase, hand, bouquet wrap, insects, landscape, text, watermark, extra decorative colors, shadows, reflections.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 16:9 high-resolution light-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Input images: visible geranium motif.png is the source reference for colors, texture, and system identity.
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn-like design-system board titled "Morphous Geranium".
Canvas: 3840 x 2160, 16:9, crisp readable UI labels and token names, no tiny text.
Required visible sections: palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
System mood: compact home system for window-box workflows, dense but calm, home-scale operational UI, 8px radii throughout.
Color palette: derive only from the reference motif: scarlet geranium petals, deeper petal red, round leaf green, leaf vein yellow-green, window-box soil brown, weathered wood neutrals, warm off-white surface. Avoid unrelated saturated colors, generic purple or blue gradients, beige-dominant styling, and stock UI-kit colors.
Layout: polished design board, left palette/token rail, central component and form examples, right dashboard/table/search/status modules, bottom row for texture, radius, spacing, shadow samples. Include a small motif cutout preview.
Typography: clear English UI type plus Japanese typography section with headings, body, captions, numerals, and examples such as "ゼラニウム", "窓辺の記録", "状態".
Components: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, card, table rows, command/search palette, compact sidebar navigation, metric cards, chart lines/bars, loading/empty/error/success states.
Texture/materials: subtle petal-vein red texture, round leaf scallop pattern, soil speckle dividers, weathered window-box wood borders.
Constraints: every visible UI element uses 8px radius or less; labels must fit inside containers; professional product design board; no marketing hero, no abstract gradients, no extra colors beyond motif-derived palette, no watermark.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 16:9 high-resolution dark-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Input images: visible geranium motif.png and the visible Morphous Geranium light board are source references.
Primary request: Generate a separate dark-mode translation titled "Morphous Geranium" with the same compact home-system coverage and layout logic as the light board.
Canvas: 3840 x 2160, 16:9, crisp readable UI labels and token names, no tiny text.
Required visible sections: dark palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
System mood: compact home system for window-box workflows, night-mode planter dashboard, dense but calm, 8px radii throughout.
Color palette: derive only from the reference motif: deep soil/wood dark backgrounds, scarlet geranium petal primary controls, muted petal red alerts, round leaf green success/accent, leaf-vein yellow-green chart accents, warm wood and soil borders. Avoid unrelated saturated colors, generic purple or blue gradients, and stock UI-kit colors.
Layout: polished dark design board, left palette/token rail, central component and form examples, right dashboard/table/search/status modules, bottom row for texture, radius, spacing, shadow samples. Include a small motif cutout preview.
Typography: clear English UI type plus Japanese typography section with headings, body, captions, numerals, and examples such as "ゼラニウム", "窓辺の記録", "状態".
Components: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, card, table rows, command/search palette, compact sidebar navigation, metric cards, chart lines/bars, loading/empty/error/success states.
Texture/materials: subtle dark petal-vein texture, round leaf scallop pattern, soil speckle panels, weathered window-box wood borders.
Constraints: every visible UI element uses 8px radius or less; labels must fit inside containers; professional product design board; no marketing hero, no abstract gradients, no extra colors beyond motif-derived palette, no watermark.
